description: Route selected original objects through additive expanded-edition action wrappers.

replacements.old:
<OBJECT FRONT-DOOR
	(IN WEST-OF-HOUSE)
	(SYNONYM DOOR)
	(ADJECTIVE FRONT BOARDED)
	(DESC "door")
	(FLAGS DOORBIT NDESCBIT)
	(ACTION FRONT-DOOR-FCN)>
replacements.new:
<OBJECT FRONT-DOOR
	(IN WEST-OF-HOUSE)
	(SYNONYM DOOR)
	(ADJECTIVE FRONT BOARDED)
	(DESC "door")
	(FLAGS DOORBIT NDESCBIT)
	(ACTION EXP-FRONT-DOOR-F)>
